claim: Interleukin-18 plays an important role in the pathogenesis of atherosclerosis.
evidence_sentences: Interleukin-18 (IL18) participates in atherogenesis through several putative mechanisms.
Interruption of IL18 action reduces atherosclerosis in mice.
In Apoe−/− mice, combined deficiency of IL18r and NCC, but not single deficiency of either protein, protects mice from atherosclerosis.

conditions: combined deficiency of IL18r and NCC
